title: Gir Forest
tagline: Gir Forest — wildlife reserve of Gujarat

overview.short: Gir National Park and Wildlife Sanctuary, also known as Sasan Gir, is a national park and wildlife sanctuary in Gujarat, India.
overview.description: Gir National Park and Wildlife Sanctuary, also known as Sasan Gir, is a national park and wildlife sanctuary in Gujarat, India. It was established in 1965 in the erstwhile Nawab of Junagarh's private hunting area, with a total area of 1,410.30 km2 (544.52 sq mi), of which 258.71 km2 (99.89 sq mi) is fully protected as a national park and 1,151.59 km2 (444.63 sq mi) as wildlife sanctuary. It is part of the Khathiar-Gir dry deciduous forests ecoregion. The 14th Asiatic Lion Census 2015 conducted in May 2015 noted the population as 523 (up 27% compared to the previous census in 2010).

topPlaces.name: Jambur, Gujarat
topPlaces.description: Jambur is a village in Gir Somnath district of Gujarat, India. It is located near Gir Forest National Park, 68 kilometres (42 mi) south of the district headquarters at Junagadh and 377 kilometres (234 mi) from the state capital of Gandhinagar.

items.note: Jambur is a village in Gir Somnath district of Gujarat, India. It is located near Gir Forest National Park, 68 kilometres (42 mi) south of the district headquarters at Junagadh and 377 kilometres (234 mi) from the state capital of Gandhinagar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gir Forest?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gir Forest is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gir Forest?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Diu Airport (49 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (128 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gir Forest?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gir Forest at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gir Forest?
faq.a: Stays in Gir Forest start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gir Forest?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jambur, Gujarat.
